event: Design for a chronicle cover — doorway to an artistic circle
description: A watercolor sketch showing an ornate doorway or entrance with heavy red-purple curtains drawn back to reveal an illuminated interior. Cyrillic text appears at the top reading the title of a chronicle. Steps lead up through the draped entrance. Inside, a white classical statue is visible amid flowers and furniture. Lanterns hang on either side of the entrance. The overall tone is warm brown and red-purple with the lit interior providing a bright focal point. The style is loose and atmospheric.

_meta.title: Chronicle of our artistic circle. Drawing for the cover.
